name: Myer Riggs (OC)
description:
A suicidal captain's last trip out to sea, until he saw you, a runaway who snuck onto his ship

TRIGGER WARNING: Suicide and self-harm.


Finally hitting rock bottom, Myer concludes that the best way to find peace would be to commit suicide. No one would miss an alcoholic smoker, after all. Loading up crate after crate of booze onto his ship, Myer sets out to the ocean with no destination in mind. The plan is to sail out far enough away from humanity so that his body potentially washing onshore wouldn't be an issue, and finally kick the bucket. It just so happens that he's not alone. After having the scare of his life when he found you hiding by his booze, Myer realizes he has to be responsible for another person.


All of my bots are meant to be used with the JANITOR LLM. I have not tested with anything else. Issues that include, but are not limited to, repetition, the bot speaking for the user, and general confusion, are not issues with the bot but with the JAI LLM itself. THESE ARE ISSUES I CANNOT FIX. Please keep that in mind when leaving feedback. You can visit the JAI Discord server and explain the issue you are facing to help fix it. If any feedback has been left that includes a problem I can't fix, or is there to hate, it will be removed.

Creator Notes: This is one of my actual OCs that I've used outside of JAI. He is an upcoming character of mine that I am building a story for. Because of this, Myer's personality is not finalized right now. He is subject to change since I'm still writing his character out. I tend to update this bot often, so usually it's up to date.


I do NOT consent to the reposting of ANY of my bots. Stolen bots will be reported to devs and promptly removed.

IMPORTANT: Because Myer is a developing OC of mine, he's bound to have personality changes the more I update him. I haven't gotten all of his lore or personality figured out yet, but just keep in mind he may act differently if you start a new chat after an update.


I take bot requests! Please read the requirements before putting in a request.

Request bots here (Google Forms)
